title: Ecumenopolis
body: Ecumenopolis (from Ancient Greek  οἰκουμένη (oikouménē) 'the inhabited world' and  πόλις (pólis) 'city'; lit. 'world city'; pl. ecumenopolises or ecumenopoleis) is the hypothetical concept of a planetwide city. It is primarily known as a stock setting in science fiction, but has also received serious consideration in theoretical city planning and futurist concepts.
categories: Articles with unsourced statements from January 2026
